---
layout: cv
title: Chandler Blacker's Resume
---
# Chandler Blacker 
Murphy, TX 
214-854-5205 | chandlerblacker@gmail.com 

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 

Business Analytics student at Brigham Young University–Idaho with strong skills in Python, R, and advanced Excel 
for data analysis and visualization.   Experienced in working in fast-paced team environments and managing 
technical systems and data reporting. Fluent in Spanish and passionate about using data to identify trends and 
support business decisions.  Seeking a Business Analytics internship to apply analytical and programming skills in a 
professional environment. 


## SKILLS 

Programming: Python, R, C++, JavaScript, HTML, VBA 
Data Libraries: Polars, Tidyverse, NumPy, ggplot2 
Data Tools: Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Data Analysis, Dashboards) 
Other Tools: Photo Editing, Video Editing, Social Media Management 
Languages: Fluent in Spanish 


## EDUCATION 

Brigham Young University–Idaho 
Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics 
Expected Graduation: April 2027 
GPA: 3.9 

## EXPERIENCE 

### DATA PROJECTS 

Data Analysis Projects — Python, R, Excel 
• Analyzed datasets using Python (Polars, NumPy) and R (Tidyverse) to identify patterns and trends 
• Built data visualizations using ggplot2 and Excel charts to communicate insights clearly 
• Performed data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory analysis across multiple datasets 

### TECHNOLOGY SPECIALIST & SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER 

The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints — Paraguay 
2024 – 2025 
• Managed mission technology systems and provided technical support for missionaries and leadership 
• Organized and tracked mission data using Excel to support reporting and planning 
• Created and edited digital media for social platforms supporting outreach and communication 
• Coordinated technology use and troubleshooting across multiple teams 

### TEAM ASSOCIATE 

In-N-Out Burger — Plano, TX 
2021 – 2023 
• Worked in a high-volume environment serving customers while maintaining speed, accuracy, and strong service 
standards 
• Trained new hires on restaurant procedures and customer service expectations 
• Began shift leadership responsibilities coordinating team members during busy periods 


## CERTIFICATIONS & ACHIEVEMENTS 

SolidWorks Basic Certification 
Eagle Scout — Boy Scouts of America



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: March 2026 -->
